channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: AI's education explosion leaves teachers in the dark
item.description: Data: Gallup; Chart: Danielle Alberti/Axios AI tools are reshaping the classroom and students' critical thinking — but school leaders are lagging on g...

item.title: Tech giants back new data center climate initiative
item.description: Microsoft, Google, Amazon and Meta are teaming up with a nonprofit investor to accelerate new technologies using data centers as test cases. Why it ma...

item.title: OpenAI and Anthropic dig in against each other on AI jobs apocalypse
item.description: AI's most powerful CEOs are splitting into warring camps over whether their own technology will gut white-collar work or supercharge it — but the trut...

item.title: Biden files lawsuit in bid to block DOJ audio interview release
item.description: Former President Biden is suing the U.S. Department of Justice in an attempt to block the release of audio recordings and transcripts of private conve...
